mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY is_default DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET receiver_name = #{receiverName}, receiver_phone = #{receiverPhone}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, detail_address = #{detailAddress}, is_default = #{isDefault}, postcode = #{postcode}, tag = #{tag} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM addresses WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_default = true LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE addresses SET is_default = false WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE addresses SET is_default = true WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
